arts.ttl: Endrick causes a problem for Ancelotti
arts.sum: So far this season, he has started only four matches : one in the Champions League against Lille (a 1-0 defeat) and three in the Copa del Rey (against Deportiva Minera, Leganés, and Real Sociedad). If Madrid reaches the final stages of all competitions, they could play up to 29 more matches, including the new Club World Cup, which runs from June to July and could add seven more games to the calendar.

arts.ttl: Neymar Junior confirms Real Madrid rejection amid Barcelona return rumours
arts.sum: Neymar Junior could still have unfinished business in La Liga amid growing links over a return to Barcelona. The Brazil international has returned to his native country to rejoin former club Santos on a short-term deal until the summer. Neymar was keen to leave Al Hilal, and Santos stepped in, but his long-term plans remain […] The post Neymar Junior confirms Real Madrid rejection amid Barcelona return rumours appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid Ace Javier Dorado Sadly Died Age 48
arts.sum: Javier Dorado, the ex-Los Blancos academy prospect, has sadly lost his long battle with cancer at the age of 48.

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Barcelona sell Vitor Roque on permanent deal
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have reached an agreement over the permanent sale of on-loan striker Vitor Roque. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who has on Thursday evening confirmed…

arts.ttl: Lucas, Valverde or Asencio? Carlo Ancelotti speaks on Real Madrid right-back plans
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided a fresh insight into his plans for the right side of the club’s backline moving forward. The right-back berth in Real Madrid’s…

arts.ttl: Man Utd look to repeat Yoro trick on Real Madrid for €75m transfer target
arts.sum: United reportedly feel they have the advantage over the likes of Real, Liverpool and Chelsea due to Amorim’s preference for three centre-backs, similar to how Lukeba already plays at Leipzig. And it appears United are eyeing another transfer coup over Real, with Spanish outlet todofichajes claiming that RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba is the club’s ‘priority’ to strengthen at left centre-back.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star ‘signs’ off on a Champions League final vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has on Thursday revealed his excitement with the prospect of a potential Champions League final showdown with Real Madrid. An El Clásico clash on the grandest…

arts.ttl: Endrick reveals why he was ‘angry’ after Real Madrid’s win over Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Madrid youngster Endrick has admitted that he was less than pleased on the back of the club’s most recent outing. Endrick, of course, is fresh off a match-winning performance…

arts.ttl: Vinícius Jr. targeted by disgustingly racist monkey gestures from fans during Real Madrid match
arts.sum: The game had already been marred by controversy, as offensive chants directed at Madrid defender Raúl Asencio forced referee José María Sánchez Martínez to pause the match and activate La Liga's anti-racism protocol, an action rarely taken in Spanish football. Real Madrid's 1-0 victory over Real Sociedad in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinal was overshadowed by yet another case of racist abuse targeting Vinícius Jr .
